title: [FIRRTL] PrefixModules and ExtractInstances Interactions
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is a tool pass ordering issue in CIRCT's FIRRTL compilation pipeline, not a SystemVerilog language construct issue. The bug involves when metadata (mems.conf, seq_mems.json) gets generated relative to module prefix renaming. The triggering constructs (FIRRTL annotations like ExtractSeqMemsFileAnnotation, NestedPrefixModulesAnnotation, smem declarations, infer mport) are FIRRTL dialect constructs, not pure SV.
